//: Story 11.0 AC #6 / Task 7 — bans hardcoded colors in component CSS. Only tokens.css may contain hex/rgba literals.

color-no-hex.message: Use a CSS custom property from tokens.css instead of a hex literal (Story 11.0 AC #6).

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Do not use rgb()/rgba() literals in component CSS — add a token to tokens.css and reference it via var(--...) (Story 11.0 AC #6).
